title: Project Management
subtitle: Collect your idea notes, reference media, and past works into reusable projects so the create page can use the same context later.

auth.title: Sign in to manage projects
auth.description: Projects store your descriptions, uploaded media, and imported works so you can reuse them across future generations.

createProject.title: Create Project
createProject.namePlaceholder: For example: Spring perfume campaign, character bible, short film boards
createProject.conceptPlaceholder: For example: cyberpunk mystery series, eastern fantasy coming-of-age story, premium skincare ad
createProject.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the project background, style direction, subject setup, or constraints you want future generations to follow.
createProject.filesHint: Upload reference documents along with the project. Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, PPTX.

projectList.title: My projects
projectList.empty: No projects yet. Create one to get started.
projectList.emptyDescription: Projects work like folders for your reusable references and descriptions. Create one, then open a card to manage it.
projectList.cardHint: Open a card to manage that project like a folder
projectList.openHint: Open a project like a folder and continue organizing your assets

detail.title: Project details
detail.conceptPlaceholder: Write the core theme, style direction, worldbuilding, or one-line inspiration for this project.
detail.descriptionPlaceholder: For example: keep the brand warm-gold palette, keep the product centered, and maintain a premium restrained mood.
detail.descriptionEmpty: This project does not have a description yet. Add one here so the create page can reuse the context better.
detail.notFoundDescription: This project may have been deleted, or you may not have access to it right now.
detail.overviewHint: Keep the project description and management controls here so they stay available while you organize assets.
detail.workspaceHint: The main area shows every asset in this project so you can filter, search, rename, and remove them.
detail.statsHint: See the current asset mix and where the media in this project came from.
detail.searchPlaceholder: Search asset titles, descriptions, or prompts
detail.filteredEmpty: No assets match the current filters.

inspiration.title: Inspiration And Storyboard Prompts
inspiration.subtitle: Capture themes, story beats, context notes, and episode continuity here, then let AI turn them into detailed video storyboard prompts.
inspiration.titlePlaceholder: For example: Episode 1 rainy chase, opening product reveal, protagonist first appearance
inspiration.emptyDescription: Start by writing the current story beat, shot idea, character state, or campaign moment, then use AI to expand it into a detailed video storyboard prompt.
inspiration.ideaPlaceholder: Describe the core idea, visual focus, character state, conflict, or product highlight for this item.
inspiration.contextPlaceholder: Add relationships, world rules, shot constraints, style continuity, or any context that should carry forward.
inspiration.plotPlaceholder: Write the current episode plot, recap, story progression, or character arc change here.
inspiration.generatedPromptHint: The result will aim to detail shots, camera movement, actions, transitions, and atmosphere.
inspiration.generatedPromptEmpty: No prompt has been generated yet. Finish the inspiration entry, then choose how much context to carry into the generation.
inspiration.generateOptionsHint: If this belongs to a series or longer narrative, carry project theme, description, documents, and previous material forward so AI can keep the setting, plot, and characters consistent.

generateOptions.includeProjectDescription: Include project theme, description, and documents

inspiration.generateModelHint: This uses the admin-configured prompt polishing model rather than a specific video provider.

projectPrompt.title: Project Image / Video Prompts
projectPrompt.subtitle: Store reusable project-level prompts here and keep them separate from the storyboard prompts generated for individual inspiration entries.
projectPrompt.filteredEmpty: No project prompts match the current filter.
projectPrompt.emptyDescription: Save reusable image or video prompts for this project here so you can copy them later without mixing them into storyboard prompts.
projectPrompt.titlePlaceholder: For example: brand key visual prompt, character poster prompt, product launch video prompt
projectPrompt.promptPlaceholder: Write the reusable project prompt here so it can be copied later.

upload.title: Upload extra assets
upload.videoIdle: Drag videos here, or click to upload
upload.videoDescription: Supports MP4, MOV, WEBM, M4V. Up to 6 files, 100MB each.
upload.documentIdle: Drag documents here, or click to upload
upload.documentDescription: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, PPTX. Up to 10 files, 50MB each.

import.title: Import my works
import.empty: No works are available to import right now.

assets.title: Project asset library
assets.empty: This project has no assets yet. Upload extra images/videos or import from your own previous works.
assets.descriptionPlaceholder: Defaults to the generated prompt or asset title. You can rewrite it for the project context.

emptySelection.title: Choose a project to manage
emptySelection.description: Create or switch projects from the left side. Once selected, you can edit the description, manage project prompts, upload assets, import your past works, and rename assets.

validation.projectConceptRequired: Please enter a project theme or inspiration first
validation.projectDescriptionSourceRequired: Provide at least one of: project theme, uploaded documents, or saved inspirations
validation.episodeNumberInvalid: Episode or sequence must be a positive integer
validation.uploadFilesRequired: Choose at least one file to upload
validation.selectWorksRequired: Select at least one work to import

confirm.deleteProjectMeta: This project currently contains {assets} asset(s), {inspirations} inspiration item(s), and {prompts} project prompt(s). This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteProject: Deleting this project will remove its asset records. Continue?
confirm.deleteAsset: Delete this asset from the project?
confirm.deleteAssetMeta: This asset is a {kind} item from {source}. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteAssetHint: Deleting it will remove the asset from this project. Continue?
confirm.deleteInspirationMeta: This will remove the inspiration text together with any generated storyboard prompt. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteInspirationHint: If this inspiration has already been used for continuity or prompt drafting, make sure removing it will not affect your later organization.
confirm.deleteInspiration: Delete this inspiration item? Its generated storyboard prompt will also be removed.
confirm.deleteProjectPrompt: Delete this project prompt? This action cannot be undone.

errors.loadInspirations: Failed to load project inspiration items
errors.generateInspirationPrompt: Failed to generate video storyboard prompt
